title: aetanthus engelsii
intro: Aetanthus engelsii, also known as the tree fern, is a type of flowering plant native to Central and South America. It is a medicinal plant with properties that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems. The medicinal properties of Aetanthus engelsii are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
